global_knowledge.answer: International returns are accepted within 45 days. Customers are responsible for international shipping costs unless the item is defective.
We currently support Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) through our BitPay integration at checkout.
Yes! All our orders are shipped using 100% recycled and biodegradable materials as part of our sustainability initiative.
We offer a 2-year limited warranty on all electronics, covering manufacturing defects and hardware failure.
